testcases.input: n = 1 Output: true Explanation: Alice can remove 1 stone winning the game because Bob doesn't have any moves.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Alice can remove 1 stone winning the game because Bob doesn't have any moves.

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: false Explanation: Alice can only remove 1 stone, after that Bob removes the last one winning the game (2 -> 1 -> 0).
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: Alice can only remove 1 stone, after that Bob removes the last one winning the game (2 -> 1 -> 0).

testcases.input: n = 4 Output: true Explanation: n is already a perfect square, Alice can win with one move, removing 4 stones (4 -> 0).
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: n is already a perfect square, Alice can win with one move, removing 4 stones (4 -> 0).
